message:
style(e2e): rustfmt tidy on benchmark comparison metadata sites

Pure formatting adjustments on the two e2e files that got
hand-wrapped import lists and multi-line chain expressions in the
previous `feat(e2e): plumb canonical benchmark comparison
metadata` commit. rustfmt wanted to reflow:

- `crates/fsqlite-e2e/src/bin/realdb_e2e.rs`: the `use
  fsqlite_e2e::fixture_select::{ ... }` import list is reflowed to
  move `PLACEMENT_PROFILE_BASELINE_UNPINNED` onto the same line as
  `PLACEMENT_PROFILE_ADVERSARIAL_CROSS_NODE` and the
  `build_benchmark_artifact_manifest` / `load_beads_benchmark_campaign`
  imports onto a single line after
  `PLACEMENT_PROFILE_RECOMMENDED_PINNED`.
- `crates/fsqlite-e2e/src/report_render.rs`: the
  `writeln!(out, "- **Mode:** {}", mode_display_name(benchmark_mode_label(s)))`
  call in `render_benchmark_summaries_markdown` is reflowed onto
  multiple lines so the chained helper calls don't exceed the 100-
  column soft limit.

No behavior change; `cargo fmt --check` passes cleanly against
both files.
